g.text: 01 / ARGUUU
A real-time, 1v1 competitive structured debate mobile and web application built with Flutter and Supabase across 59+ screens.
Engineered with a turn-based chess clock, live audience voting, Elo-based rating system, and bot humanization.
FLUTTER · SUPABASE · DART · CHESS CLOCK · GAMIFICATION · SRS-COMPLIANT
02 / BLOODLINE
Software supply chain contagion mapper modeling vulnerability propagation velocities through directed graph network visualizations.
Incorporates BFS/DFS traversal mechanics and mathematical danger window parameters using Node.js and D3.js.
NODE.JS · D3.JS · DIRECTED GRAPHS · BFS / DFS · VULNERABILITY MODELING
03 / BLUE PARTICLE STUDIOS
Founder & Lead Coordinator of the commission-based application development studio running client app commission pipelines.
Built studio site and manages delivery operations across Core / Foundation / Signature tiered pricing tiers.
MOBILE APPS · WEB CLIENTS · COMMISSIONS · STUDIO LEADERSHIP · DEV OPERATIONS
04 / WALLETPADDI
Team Lead of Team Tensor; won first place at the Wema Bank Hackaholics 6.0 North-Central regional finals.
Engineered secure payment transacting, banking workflows, and regional fintech prototypes.
FLUTTER · DART · FINTECH · HACKAHOLICS 6.0 · AWARD WINNING · TEAM LEAD
05 / WHEREARETHEY
Live, crowdsourced missing persons digital directory for Nigeria engineered for quick spatial lookups.
Integrated a Flutter web frontend with a robust Supabase backend database layer.
FLUTTER WEB · SUPABASE · GEOSPATIAL · SOCIAL IMPACT · REAL-TIME
06 / FEMN
Politically neutral, civic social activism mobile application engineered as Team Lead for social advocacy.
Converted from React version into a ~2,100-line single main.dart file for fast load execution.
FLUTTER · DART · FIREBASE · SOCIAL ACTIVISM · CODE OPTIMIZATION
07 / AUMEN
AI-powered productivity application designed and pitched as a personalized "Life OS" system.
Delivered script, pitch deck, and prototype category presentation at Nile University Startup Competition 6.0.
PRODUCTIVITY · PITCH DECK · LIFE OS · STARTUP PITCH · PROTOTYPING
08 / SPAVER
Personal financial expense-tracking application incorporating automated local UBA SMS transaction parsing.
SQLite storage backend configured with custom Android dynamic launcher shortcuts; near-production ready.
FLUTTER · DART · SQLITE · SMS PARSING · CUSTOM SHORTCUTS · LOCAL STORAGE
09 / BEACORA
Location-based safety application designed with offline Bluetooth and SMS emergency alerts.
Distributed directly via personal download site instead of app stores for offline public resilience.
FLUTTER · OFFLINE CONNECTIVITY · BLUETOOTH LE · SMS ALERTS
10 / VITA
NFC-based health identity application combining community funding structures and an SMS bot interface.
Built and delivered as a complete user interface prototype for a Google/OPay hackathon.
FLUTTER · NFC · OPAY HACKATHON · GOOGLE CLOUD · SMS BOT
11 / CLASSROOM ALLOCATION SYSTEM
Automated academic examination seating database and seat allocation system.
Served as Team Lead and documentation compiler organizing examinee distributions.
SQL · DATABASE DESIGN · EXAMINATION SCHEDULING · TEAM LEAD
12 / LEGUIDE
Tutoring marketplace user interface built to connect private tutors with students.
Implemented dynamic search profiles, rating views, and interactive scheduling interfaces.
FLUTTER · DART · MARKETPLACE · UI DESIGN
13 / OCEAN BASKET NIGERIA
3D promotional web interface created for Ocean Basket Nigeria using advanced graphic libraries.
Engineered with Vite, Three.js, GSAP, and custom shaders for high-performance 3D rendering.
VITE · THREE.JS · GSAP · WebGL · 3D WEB
14 / HARBOR HAVEN FOUNDATION
Complete 7-page responsive web platform built for a nonprofit activist foundation.
Features donation integrations, content pages, contact forms, and media galleries.
HTML · CSS · JAVASCRIPT · NONPROFIT · WEB DESIGN
15 / KIDS CODING BOOTCAMP
Designed curriculum for a 1-month kids coding bootcamp (ages 6-12), teaching DartPad and FlutLab.
Led 60 hours of training ending in students building installable, functional mobile apps.
CURRICULUM DESIGN · DARTPAD · FLUTLAB · MOBILE DEV · TEACHING
